name: @appstrate/set-checkpoint
description: Persist a checkpoint for the next run. Supports per-actor and shared scopes.

tool.name: set_checkpoint
tool.description: Persist a JSON value for the next run (last-write-wins). By default the checkpoint is scoped to the current actor (the user or end-user that triggered the run); pass scope="shared" for an app-wide checkpoint.

data.description: JSON value to persist as the checkpoint for the next run

scope.description: Persistence scope: "actor" (default) keeps the checkpoint private to the run's actor; "shared" makes it app-wide.
